verdict: Stronger than v1. The tone has more human texture, better shared-pain framing, and more natural Oratia/context integration without tipping into promotion.
strengths: More recognizable operator voice and less generic business-content tone
Shared-pain asides make the tweets feel more human
Oratia mention feels observational rather than pushy
Thread bodies have more texture and room realism
problems: A few lines may still be slightly too polished for a truly native Twitter voice
Humor balance should stay light so it doesn't become a formula
The account voice still needs testing across additional books and topics
required_fixes: Pressure-test this tone on at least one or two additional books
Continue trimming any line that sounds too crafted instead of simply true
